# QuizFlowKit

> AI-powered quiz funnel builder for TikTok, Instagram, and Meta Ads. Generate high-converting interactive quizzes for paid social in minutes.

QuizFlowKit helps creators, media buyers, ecommerce brands, and agencies replace static landing pages with AI-generated quiz funnels optimized for paid social advertising.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, templates, pricing, and FAQ.
